DEFENDANT TO ANSWER THE COMPLAINT WITHIN TEN DAYS. CALIFORNIA ALLOWS PAROLE EVIDENCE TO EXPLAIN THE CONTEXT AND MEANING OF WRITTEN AGREEMENTS MASTERSON V SINI (1968) 68 CAL 2D 222; P.G.& E. V THOMAS DRAYAGE & RIGGING CO. (1968) 69 CAL 2D 33. ACCORDINGLY, ALTHOUGH THE LANGUAGE OF THE COVENANT NOT TO SUE MAY APPEAR TO BE CLEAR, IT NOT IS APPROPRIATE TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER. MR. PACKARD TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
